name: Q-12 --summarize-by subagent_id aggregates per-subagent invocation count tokens and latency per §26
command: for i in review-types review-compliance review-types; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id $i --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 2>/dev/null; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --summarize-by subagent_id 2>out.txt && grep -q '\[review-types\] invocations=2' out.txt && grep -q '\[review-compliance\] invocations=1' out.txt && echo summarized 1>&2
